summary: Backend + frontend verified for F1 sim updates: chronological race calendars, fast finish (no AI), and normal finish (news on last race).
passed: GET /api/seasons/2020 returns valid data (17 races, Hamilton)
POST /api/simulations/{id}/finish?fast=true: 138-162ms, finished=true, races[-1].news=None, standings valid across 4 eras
POST /api/simulations/{id}/finish (no fast): last race gets AI news dict with title 'CHARLES LECLERC VENCE EM BAKU'; only last race has news (0 others)
Frontend SimulationPage: both finish-all-button and finish-fast-button render
Fast finish click: season completed in 0.19s UI-side, season-finished-label shown, champion=Lewis Hamilton, 0 race-news elements rendered
